capability_objective: Need the full case at sup-105—lookup only. One native call, no chat. Keep “sup-105” as the literal string ID; don’t search by name or turn its numeric portion into a number.
prompt: Need the full case at sup-105—lookup only. Work only in the provided sandbox and use Pi's genuine Bash tool to invoke the local `./support-case` executable. Use its read-only `get` operation, which accepts a stable ID through `--id`. Make exactly one Bash tool call containing exactly one support-case invocation and no other shell command. Keep `sup-105` unchanged as the literal string-valued ID: do not search by name, list cases, request a profile, update, cancel, notify, or turn any portion of the ID into a number. Do not directly inspect or modify the executable, its backing or runtime data, its audit evidence, or anything under `.harness`, and do not directly create any file; the executable's own runtime initialization and audit side effects are expected. After the call returns the complete case, end immediately with no conversational response, summary, code fence, or repeated data.
